zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de L'Isle於大約1303年出生在英國波克夏斯帕斯爾特時，她的父親Warin de L'Isle19歲，母親Alice Tyeys18歲。她於大約1326年與Edmund Inkeney在英國英格蘭波克夏金斯頓 李爾結婚。她去世於1362年在英國波克夏金斯頓 李爾享年60歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de L'Isle于大约1303年出生在英国波克夏斯帕斯爾特时，她的父亲Warin de L'Isle19岁，母亲Alice Tyeys18岁。她于大约1326年与Edmund Inkeney在英国英格兰波克夏金斯頓 李爾结婚。她去世于1362年在英国波克夏金斯頓 李爾享年60岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: L'Isle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland, Durham, and Yorkshire): variant of   Lyle   and a cognate of 2 below.
French: habitational name from L'Isle or Lisle, names of several places in various parts of France, named with Old French isle ‘island’ (from Latin insula). Compare Delisle .

variants.name: Lyle
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): topographic or habitational name from Anglo-Norman French del isle ‘from the island’ (from Latin de insula), denoting someone who lived on an island or who came from a place in France named Ile, Isle, or L'Isle. The surname may also in some cases be from Lille (Nord). Compare Lisle and Iles .

variants.name: Lile
meanings: English and French: variant of   Lisle  .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de L'Isle was born about 1303, in Sparsholt, Berkshire, England, her father, Warin de L'Isle, was 19 and her mother, Alice Tyeys, was 18. She married Edmund Inkeney about 1326, in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. She died in 1362, in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.Frome St. Quintin, Dorsetshire, England: Frome St Quintin, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de L'Isle est née environ 1303, à Sparsholt, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Warin de L'Isle, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Alice Tyeys, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Inkeney environ 1326, à Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée en 1362, à Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.Frome St. Quintin, Dorsetshire, England: Frome St Quintin, Dorset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de L'Isle um 1303 in Sparsholt, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Warin de L'Isle 19 und ihre Mutter Alice Tyeys 18. Sie hat um 1326 in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Edmund Inkeney geheiratet. Sie starb 1362 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England und wurde in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de L'Isle è nata il circa 1303 nel Sparsholt, Berkshire, England, sua padre, Warin de L'Isle, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Alice Tyeys, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Edmund Inkeney circa 1326, nel Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1362, nel Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de L'Isleが約1303年にイギリスバークシュアイアスパーショルトで生まれた時，父Warin de L'Isleは19歳，母Alice Tyeysは18歳であった。約1326年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアキングストン リスルでEdmund Inkeneyと結婚した。彼女は1362年にイギリスバークシュアイアキングストン リスルで60歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Frome St. Quintin, Dorsetshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 프롬 스트 퀸틴
ko.lifeSummary: Margery de L'Isle(이)가 대략 1303년 영국 버크실르 스파르쇼트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Warin de L'Isle(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Tyeys(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1326년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 킨그스턴 리슬일에서 Edmund Inkeney(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1362년 영국 버크실르 킨그스턴 리슬일에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에 묻혔다.

pt.Frome St. Quintin, Dorsetshire, England: Frome St Quintin, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de L'Isle nasceu aproximadamente 1303, em Sparsholt, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Warin de L'Isle, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Alice Tyeys, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund Inkeney aproximadamente 1326, em Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 1362, em Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.Frome St. Quintin, Dorsetshire, England: фром ст куинтинь, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de L'Isle родилась около 1303 г. в местности спаршолт, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Warin de L'Isle было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Tyeys, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Inkeney около 1326 г. в местности кингстон лисл, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла в 1362 г. в местности кингстон лисл, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery de L'Isle nació aproximadamente 1303, en Sparsholt, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Warin de L'Isle, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Alice Tyeys, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Edmund Inkeney aproximadamente 1326, en Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1362, en Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
